persistence_invariants.brief: Composite UNIQUE(sku, location): no two rows share the pair; refiling resolves to one row at write time (R3, AC3/AC4).
sku, location, quantity, and inventory_code are NOT NULL; a filed record always carries all four (AC1 form fields / AC2 round-trip).
CHECK quantity >= 0: a stored stock level can never be negative (R2 no-negative floor defended at write time).
The Alembic migration creating stock_records applies and reverses cleanly on the branch, and additive changes preserve pre-existing rows (R1).

nfrs.brief: Existing stock records survive every additive schema migration with no loss; each record carries an unmodifiable created_at timestamp and actor set by the service and stored immutably by the model. Defended by PI4.
nfrs.fitness_function: Real-branch integration test: apply the Alembic revision to the paired branch over seeded rows, assert pre-existing rows and their immutable timestamp/actor survive, and the down revision reverses cleanly.

nfrs.brief: Stock levels never persist below zero and never overcommit; an overcommitting write is rejected at write time, never stored negative or double-allocated. S1 files quantity directly; the non-negative floor is the part F1 upholds (PI3), full overcommit rejection lands in the later pick stories.
nfrs.fitness_function: Real-branch integration test: a write resulting in a negative quantity is rejected at write time; no negative row is ever stored (CHECK quantity >= 0).

nfrs.brief: Every SKU at every location is uniquely addressable by (sku, location); a collision is resolved at write time (last-write-wins single row) via the composite unique constraint PI1 plus a service-level upsert, never two duplicates (AC3) and never an error page (AC4).
nfrs.fitness_function: Real-branch integration test: submit the same (sku, location) pair twice; assert exactly one row holds the newly filed values and the second submit returns a 2xx confirmation, not an error page.

nfrs.brief: Integration tests run against the paired Lakebase branch (databricks_postgres), never a mock or in-memory substitute; CI refuses to merge a PR whose integration tests do not run against a real branch.
nfrs.fitness_function: pytest-bdd suite binds to the branch DB via conftest fixtures with Alembic migrations applied to the branch first and FK-aware targeted-DELETE cleanup; CI gate asserts the real-branch connection is used.

nfrs.brief: The UI is a React + TypeScript single-page application under client/ that navigates client-side with no full-page reloads; the boundary layer returns JSON, not server-rendered HTML (boundary renders_via: react). The client ships its own component tests; the API is covered by the R4 branch integration tests.
nfrs.fitness_function: Layering/config fitness test: the boundary returns JSON (no server-rendered templates); client/ Vitest + Playwright harness covers SPA navigation with no full-page reload.

nfrs.brief: DB connection resolves from env (the DATABASE_URL the post-checkout hook writes for the paired branch, database databricks_postgres); no hardcoded DSN and no app-specific DB name (twelve-factor config-in-env). Architect-proposed beyond the Required brief.
nfrs.fitness_function: Config-in-env fitness test: no hardcoded DSN; app and Alembic env read the injected DATABASE_URL and connect to databricks_postgres on the paired branch.

nfrs.brief: Validation failures return a clear, specific message naming the offending field (e.g. "quantity must be >= 0"), not a bare "bad request". Owned at the API boundary. PO preference; Architect-proposed beyond the Required brief.
nfrs.fitness_function: Integration test: an invalid filing submit returns a field-named inline error, not a generic 400 body.

nfrs.brief: The by-location listing renders cleanly when there is nothing to show: a location with zero records displays an explicit "No stock at this location" message, never a blank region or a null crash (AC3). The service returns an empty collection distinctly from an error; the client owns the empty-state view. PO preference; Architect-proposed beyond the Required brief.
nfrs.fitness_function: Real-branch integration + client test: with no seeded rows for a location the service returns an empty collection (2xx, not an error) and the SPA renders the explicit empty-state message, asserted against the branch and the Vitest/Playwright harness.
